People are weird.

Tell em Bill Gates makes $1.38 million every hour and they’re all YESSSSS and drooling down their chin.

But tell em it’s possible to earn 5 figures per month and they look at you funny.

Suddenly they have all these questions.

Like ‘who, me?’

Generate 5 figures for myself?’

‘Doing what?’

‘I’m no Bill Gates.’

...

I mean, yeah. Most of us aren't 🤷

Bill Gates wouldn’t wipe his nose with 10K. 🤧

But for most, 5-10k+ month is a life changer.

Especially when all the pieces of the business are built out.

The website? Set up.

Advertising? Done.

Closing the sale? That's what our commission-only sales team is for.

We currently have a sales team of 10-20 trained closer's, who make outbound calls to all leads.

Our investors & partners can benefit from an automated lead generation process.

That means there is no hassle in terms of ad setup, lead generation, outbound calling, or closing.

And total time invested? 15 hours per week, or less.

Hmm?

What’s that? 👂

Oh.

Still feeling skeptical.

Totally understandable.

Bill Gates earns $336,960,000 a month but the rest of us are destined to stay stuck in a clock-in, clock-out J-O-B.

Makes perfect sense. 🙄

...or maybe it's time to find a better way.

Right now our partner's are able to take a breather thanks to a fully automated online business.

Hmm?

What’s that? 👂

Why are we telling you this, you ask?

Because. The product has already been developed.

It’s ours!

Which is great news for everyone!

No need to rip hair out inventing some innovative new “thing.”

That’s literally the point.

Utilize our tested business model.

Promote an existing service.

Rake in the sales. 📞

And yes. Along the way, our business grows, too.

(Good catch, you hawk-eyed genius, you.)

Huh?

Say again? 👂

Ah.

No start-up money?

But...

Neither do the majority of new businesses.

We’ve got a private equity group.

We’re partnered with banks.

And there’s several start-up packages on offer.

Meaning we’re fully equipped to help our partners Pass & Go.

So here’s how it works:

Our new partner join's.

Plugs into a prebuilt advertising package.

Website goes up.

Starts getting traffic.

Visitors book calls.

A designated Success Coach handles all inquiries.

Calls turn into enrollments.

Each enrollment nets our partners anywhere from 50-70% of the sale price.

Rinse. Repeat.

Literal no-brainer.

https://mattsmarketingblueprint.com/start

Don't build the website. ❌

Create the ads. ❌

Develop ad targeting. ❌

Answer phone calls. ❌

Or close any sales. ❌

Meanwhile just imagine being curled up on the couch.

In a onesie and cradling a bag of Cheetos.

Refreshing the bank app every half hour and watching the count climb.📈

Literal. No. Brainer.

Just flip the switch.

Flip the switch already!!
